filters.name: uppercase
filters.description: No.JS: Converts string to UPPERCASE.

filters.name: lowercase
filters.description: No.JS: Converts string to lowercase.

filters.name: capitalize
filters.description: No.JS: Capitalizes first letter of string.

filters.name: truncate
filters.description: No.JS: Truncates string to given length (default 100). Appends "..." when truncated.

filters.name: trim
filters.description: No.JS: Removes leading and trailing whitespace.

filters.name: stripHtml
filters.description: No.JS: Strips HTML tags from string.

filters.name: slugify
filters.description: No.JS: Converts string to URL-friendly slug.

filters.name: nl2br
filters.description:
No.JS: Converts newlines to `
` tags.

filters.name: encodeUri
filters.description: No.JS: Encodes string as URI component.

filters.name: number
filters.description: No.JS: Formats number with locale formatting.

filters.name: currency
filters.description: No.JS: Formats number as currency.

filters.name: percent
filters.description: No.JS: Formats number as percentage.

filters.name: filesize
filters.description: No.JS: Formats bytes as human-readable file size.

filters.name: ordinal
filters.description: No.JS: Converts number to ordinal string (1st, 2nd, 3rd...).

filters.name: count
filters.description: No.JS: Returns length/count of array or string.

filters.name: first
filters.description: No.JS: Returns first element of array.

filters.name: last
filters.description: No.JS: Returns last element of array.

filters.name: join
filters.description: No.JS: Joins array elements into a string.

filters.name: reverse
filters.description: No.JS: Reverses array or string.

filters.name: unique
filters.description: No.JS: Returns unique values from array.

filters.name: pluck
filters.description: No.JS: Extracts a property from each item in array.

filters.name: sortBy
filters.description: No.JS: Sorts array by property. Prefix key with `-` for descending order (e.g. `sortBy:'-age'`).

filters.name: where
filters.description: No.JS: Filters array by property value.

filters.name: date
filters.description: No.JS: Formats date value.

filters.name: datetime
filters.description: No.JS: Formats date with time using locale default format.

filters.name: relative
filters.description: No.JS: Converts date to relative time string.

filters.name: fromNow
filters.description: No.JS: Converts date to 'time from now' string.

filters.name: default
filters.description: No.JS: Returns fallback value if input is null/undefined/empty.

filters.name: json
filters.description: No.JS: Converts value to JSON string.

filters.name: debug
filters.description: No.JS: Logs value to console and returns it.

filters.name: keys
filters.description: No.JS: Returns object keys as array.

filters.name: values
filters.description: No.JS: Returns object values as array.
